CustomField.description: JSON array summarizing the documents created, e.g. [{"type":"BANK_STATEMENT","count":2}].
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Read-only audit field. JSON summary of saved files, e.g. [{"type":"BANK_STATEMENT","count":2,"sources":["Chase","Wells Fargo"]}]. Read by reports, not edited by users.
CustomField.label: Type Breakdown JSON
